system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.thongkesoluong_baocao_khachhang1","body":"CREATE PROC [dbo].[THONGKESOLUONG_BAOCAO_KHACHHANG1]
(
	@action int,
	@makh nvarchar(50)
)
AS
BEGIN
		SELECT A.order_number, A.item_number,a.[description]
		, SUM(A.order_qty) AS order_qty
	INTO #ORDER
	FROM tr_order_detail A
	WHERE A.Finished = 0 
		AND A.f_cancelled = 'N' 
		AND A.choduyet = 1
		--AND A.order_number IN (SELECT dbo.TRIM([value]) FROM dbo.fn_Split(@ORDERNUMBER, ','))
	GROUP BY A.order_number, A.item_number,a.[description]

	SELECT A.MADONHANG, A.MASP, A.BOPHAN
		, SUM(CASE WHEN A.BOPHAN = 'DPH' THEN A.SOLUONG ELSE 0 END) AS SOLUONG_DP
		, SUM(CASE WHEN A.BOPHAN = 'DHI' THEN A.SOLUONG ELSE 0 END) AS SOLUONG_DH
		, SUM(CASE WHEN A.BOPHAN = 'LRA' THEN A.SOLUONG ELSE 0 END) AS SOLUONG_LR
		, SUM(CASE WHEN A.BOPHAN = 'KNH' THEN A.SOLUONG ELSE 0 END) AS SOLUONG_KN
		, SUM(CASE WHEN A.BOPHAN = 'SON' THEN A.SOLUONG ELSE 0 END) AS SOLUONG_SO
		, SUM(CASE WHEN A.BOPHAN = 'DGO' THEN A.SOLUONG ELSE 0 END) AS SOLUONG_DG
	INTO #THONGKE
	FROM tr_thongke_soluong A
	GROUP BY A.MADONHANG, A.MASP, A.BOPHAN

	SELECT A.MADONHANG, A.MASP, A.BOPHAN
		, SUM(CASE WHEN A.BOPHAN = 'DPH' THEN A.SOLUONG ELSE 0 END) AS SOLUONG_DP_HISTORY
		, SUM(CASE WHEN A.BOPHAN = 'DHI' THEN A.SOLUONG ELSE 0 END) AS SOLUONG_DH_HISTORY
		, SUM(CASE WHEN A.BOPHAN = 'LRA' THEN A.SOLUONG ELSE 0 END) AS SOLUONG_LR_HISTORY
		, SUM(CASE WHEN A.BOPHAN = 'KNH' THEN A.SOLUONG ELSE 0 END) AS SOLUONG_KN_HISTORY
		, SUM(CASE WHEN A.BOPHAN = 'SON' THEN A.SOLUONG ELSE 0 END) AS SOLUONG_SO_HISTORY
		, SUM(CASE WHEN A.BOPHAN = 'DGO' THEN A.SOLUONG ELSE 0 END) AS SOLUONG_DG_HISTORY
	INTO #THONGKE_HISTORY
	FROM tr_thongke_soluong A
	WHERE CAST(A.ngaytao as date) < CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
	GROUP BY A.MADONHANG, A.MASP, A.BOPHAN
	

	SELECT A.order_number, A.item_number, A.order_qty, B.BOPHAN,a.[description]
		, isnull(B.SOLUONG_DP,0) as SOLUONG_DP
		, CAST(CAST(isnull(B.SOLUONG_DP,0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) / CAST(A.order_qty AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS DECIMAL(18,4)) AS DP_PERCENT
		, isnull(B.SOLUONG_DH,0) as SOLUONG_DH
		, CAST(CAST( isnull(B.SOLUONG_DH,0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) / CAST(A.order_qty AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS DECIMAL(18,4)) AS DH_PERCENT
		, isnull(B.SOLUONG_LR,0) as SOLUONG_LR
		, CAST(CAST(isnull(B.SOLUONG_LR,0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) / CAST(A.order_qty AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS DECIMAL(18,4)) AS LR_PERCENT
		, isnull(B.SOLUONG_KN,0) as SOLUONG_KN
		, CAST(CAST(isnull(B.SOLUONG_KN,0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) / CAST(A.order_qty AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS DECIMAL(18,4)) AS KN_PERCENT
		, isnull(B.SOLUONG_SO,0) as SOLUONG_SO 
		, CAST(CAST(isnull(B.SOLUONG_SO,0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) / CAST(A.order_qty AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS DECIMAL(18,4)) AS SO_PERCENT
		, isnull(B.SOLUONG_DG,0) as SOLUONG_DG 
		, CAST(CAST(isnull(B.SOLUONG_DG,0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) / CAST(A.order_qty AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS DECIMAL(18,4)) AS DG_PERCENT
		,(CASE WHEN isnull(B.SOLUONG_DP,0) > isnull(C.SOLUONG_DP_HISTORY,0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DP_HISTORY
		,(CASE WHEN isnull(B.SOLUONG_DH,0) > isnull(C.SOLUONG_DH_HISTORY,0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DH_HISTORY
		,(CASE WHEN isnull(B.SOLUONG_LR,0) > isnull(C.SOLUONG_LR_HISTORY,0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS LR_HISTORY
		,(CASE WHEN isnull(B.SOLUONG_KN,0) > isnull(C.SOLUONG_KN_HISTORY,0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS KN_HISTORY
		,(CASE WHEN isnull(B.SOLUONG_SO,0) > isnull(C.SOLUONG_SO_HISTORY,0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SO_HISTORY
		,(CASE WHEN isnull(B.SOLUONG_DG,0) > isnull(C.SOLUONG_DG_HISTORY,0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DG_HISTORY
	INTO #RESULT1
	FROM #ORDER A
		LEFT JOIN #THONGKE B 
		ON A.item_number = B.MASP AND A.order_number = B.MADONHANG
		LEFT JOIN #THONGKE_HISTORY C 
		ON A.item_number = C.MASP AND A.order_number = C.MADONHANG
	ORDER BY A.order_number, A.item_number, B.BOPHAN


	IF(@action = 1)
	BEGIN
		SELECT A.*, B.tensp,c.customer_name
		FROM #RESULT1 A
			LEFT JOIN tr_sanpham B ON A.item_number = B.masp
			LEFT JOIN tr_khachhang c on b.customer = c.customer_id
		--WHERE c.customer_name = 'A-AMERICA' 
		ORDER BY A.order_number, A.item_number
	END
	ELSE IF(@action = 2)
	BEGIN
		SELECT A.*, B.tensp,c.customer_name
		FROM #RESULT1 A
			LEFT JOIN tr_sanpham B ON A.item_number = B.masp
			LEFT JOIN tr_khachhang c on b.customer = c.customer_id
		WHERE c.customer_id = @makh
		ORDER BY A.order_number, A.item_number
	END
	drop table #ORDER,#THONGKE,#RESULT1,#THONGKE_HISTORY
END","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_khachhang","dbo.tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_thongke_soluong"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
